1	import Foundation
2	import MLX
3	import MLXAudioCore
4	
5	struct BenchmarkResult: Sendable, Identifiable, Codable, Equatable {
6	    let id: String                  // record id
7	    let recordCreatedAt: String
8	    let groundTruth: String         // record.editedTranscript at run time (treated as ground truth)
9	    let predictedRaw: String        // model output before post-process
10	    let predictedEdited: String     // after TranscriptPostProcessor (final pipeline output)
11	
12	    // Strict scoring — whitespace-only normalization. Preserves case + punctuation + full-width.
13	    let editDistance: Int
14	    let referenceLength: Int
15	    let cer: Double
16	    let exactMatch: Bool
17	
18	    // Lenient scoring — aggressive normalization (lowercase, full→half width, strip punctuation).
19	    // Matches the convention Whisper-style ASR benchmarks report. Optional for forward-compat
20	    // with any legacy in-memory report objects that predate this field.
21	    let editDistanceNormalized: Int?
22	    let referenceLengthNormalized: Int?
23	    let cerNormalized: Double?
24	    let exactMatchNormalized: Bool?
25	
26	    let durationMs: Int
27	    let error: String?
28	
29	    var passed: Bool { error == nil }
30	
31	    /// Pick the right metric tuple based on the user's display toggle. Falls back to the strict
32	    /// fields when an older report doesn't carry normalized values.
33	    func cer(useNormalized: Bool) -> Double {
34	        useNormalized ? (cerNormalized ?? cer) : cer
35	    }
36	    func exactMatch(useNormalized: Bool) -> Bool {
37	        useNormalized ? (exactMatchNormalized ?? exactMatch) : exactMatch
38	    }
39	}
40	
41	struct BenchmarkReport: Sendable, Codable {
42	    let modelID: String
43	    let chinesePreference: ChinesePreference
44	    let runAt: String               // ISO8601 timestamp
45	    let results: [BenchmarkResult]
46	
47	    var total: Int { results.count }
48	    var completed: Int { results.filter { $0.error == nil }.count }
49	    var failed: Int { results.filter { $0.error != nil }.count }
50	
51	    func exactMatchCount(useNormalized: Bool) -> Int {
52	        results.filter { $0.exactMatch(useNormalized: useNormalized) }.count
53	    }
54	    func exactMatchRate(useNormalized: Bool) -> Double {
55	        total == 0 ? 0 : Double(exactMatchCount(useNormalized: useNormalized)) / Double(total)
56	    }
57	
58	    func averageCER(useNormalized: Bool) -> Double {
59	        let valid = results.filter { $0.error == nil }
60	        guard !valid.isEmpty else { return 0 }
61	        return valid.map { $0.cer(useNormalized: useNormalized) }.reduce(0, +) / Double(valid.count)
62	    }
63	
64	    var averageLatencyMs: Int {
65	        let valid = results.filter { $0.error == nil }
66	        guard !valid.isEmpty else { return 0 }
67	        return valid.map(\.durationMs).reduce(0, +) / valid.count
68	    }
69	}
70	
71	/// Sendable per-record progress callback payload.
72	struct BenchmarkProgress: Sendable {
73	    let completed: Int
74	    let total: Int
75	    let currentRecordID: String
76	}
77	
78	/// Runs the full transcription pipeline (audio decode → model → post-process) against every
79	/// record in a dataset slice, comparing against the stored editedTranscript. Honors Task
80	/// cancellation between records.
81	actor BenchmarkRunner {
82	    func run(
83	        records: [DatasetRecord],
84	        runtime: any ASRRuntime,
85	        chinesePreference: ChinesePreference,
86	        audioURLProvider: @Sendable (DatasetRecord) async -> URL,
87	        progress: @Sendable (BenchmarkProgress) async -> Void = { _ in }
88	    ) async throws -> BenchmarkReport {
89	        var results: [BenchmarkResult] = []
90	        results.reserveCapacity(records.count)
91	
92	        for (index, record) in records.enumerated() {
93	            try Task.checkCancellation()
94	            await progress(BenchmarkProgress(completed: index, total: records.count, currentRecordID: record.id))
95	
96	            let audioURL = await audioURLProvider(record)
97	            let result = await transcribe(record: record, audioURL: audioURL, runtime: runtime, chinesePreference: chinesePreference)
98	            results.append(result)
99	        }
100	
101	        try Task.checkCancellation()
102	        await progress(BenchmarkProgress(completed: records.count, total: records.count, currentRecordID: ""))
103	
104	        let modelID = await runtime.modelID
105	        let runAt = ISO8601DateFormatter().string(from: Date())
106	        return BenchmarkReport(modelID: modelID, chinesePreference: chinesePreference, runAt: runAt, results: results)
107	    }
108	
109	    private func transcribe(record: DatasetRecord, audioURL: URL, runtime: any ASRRuntime, chinesePreference: ChinesePreference) async -> BenchmarkResult {
110	        let groundTruth = record.editedTranscript
111	        let start = Date()
112	
113	        // Decode audio → [Float] mirroring production pipeline.
114	        let samples: [Float]
115	        do {
116	            let (_, mlxArray) = try loadAudioArray(from: audioURL, sampleRate: 16000)
117	            samples = mlxArray.asArray(Float.self)
118	        } catch {
119	            return failure(record: record, groundTruth: groundTruth, error: error, start: start)
120	        }
121	
122	        // Run the streaming pipeline end-to-end.
123	        var rawText = ""
124	        do {
125	            for try await event in runtime.transcribeStream(samples: samples, sampleRate: 16000, options: ASROptions(language: record.language)) {
126	                try Task.checkCancellation()
127	                switch event {
128	                case .token(let t):
129	                    rawText += t
130	                case .result(let r):
131	                    rawText = r.text  // final result overrides token-by-token concat
132	                }
133	            }
134	        } catch {
135	            return failure(record: record, groundTruth: groundTruth, error: error, start: start)
136	        }
137	
138	        let editedText = TranscriptPostProcessor.apply(chinesePreference, to: rawText)
139	        let elapsedMs = Int(Date().timeIntervalSince(start) * 1000)
140	
141	        let lightRef = TextMetrics.normalize(groundTruth, mode: .light)
142	        let lightHyp = TextMetrics.normalize(editedText, mode: .light)
143	        let lightDist = TextMetrics.editDistance(lightRef, lightHyp)
144	        let lightCER = lightRef.isEmpty ? (lightHyp.isEmpty ? 0 : 1) : Double(lightDist) / Double(lightRef.count)
145	
146	        let aggrRef = TextMetrics.normalize(groundTruth, mode: .aggressive)
147	        let aggrHyp = TextMetrics.normalize(editedText, mode: .aggressive)
148	        let aggrDist = TextMetrics.editDistance(aggrRef, aggrHyp)
149	        let aggrCER = aggrRef.isEmpty ? (aggrHyp.isEmpty ? 0 : 1) : Double(aggrDist) / Double(aggrRef.count)
150	
151	        return BenchmarkResult(
152	            id: record.id,
153	            recordCreatedAt: record.createdAt,
154	            groundTruth: groundTruth,
155	            predictedRaw: rawText,
156	            predictedEdited: editedText,
157	            editDistance: lightDist,
158	            referenceLength: lightRef.count,
159	            cer: lightCER,
160	            exactMatch: lightRef == lightHyp,
161	            editDistanceNormalized: aggrDist,
162	            referenceLengthNormalized: aggrRef.count,
163	            cerNormalized: aggrCER,
164	            exactMatchNormalized: aggrRef == aggrHyp,
165	            durationMs: elapsedMs,
166	            error: nil
167	        )
168	    }
169	
170	    private func failure(record: DatasetRecord, groundTruth: String, error: Error, start: Date) -> BenchmarkResult {
171	        let elapsedMs = Int(Date().timeIntervalSince(start) * 1000)
172	        return BenchmarkResult(
173	            id: record.id,
174	            recordCreatedAt: record.createdAt,
175	            groundTruth: groundTruth,
176	            predictedRaw: "",
177	            predictedEdited: "",
178	            editDistance: 0,
179	            referenceLength: groundTruth.count,
180	            cer: 0,
181	            exactMatch: false,
182	            editDistanceNormalized: 0,
183	            referenceLengthNormalized: groundTruth.count,
184	            cerNormalized: 0,
185	            exactMatchNormalized: false,
186	            durationMs: elapsedMs,
187	            error: String(describing: error)
188	        )
189	    }
190	}

1	import Foundation
2	import Observation
3	
4	@MainActor
5	@Observable
6	final class BenchmarkController {
7	    // Configuration (bound to UI pickers)
8	    var selectedProfile: ModelProfile
9	    var selectedPreference: ChinesePreference
10	    /// When true, CER / exact-match read the aggressive-normalized fields (Whisper-style:
11	    /// lowercase, strip punctuation, full→half width). When false, they use the strict fields
12	    /// (whitespace-only normalization). Pure view toggle — both metrics are always computed.
13	    var useNormalizedMetrics: Bool = true
14	
15	    // Runtime state
16	    private(set) var isRunning: Bool = false
17	    private(set) var progressCompleted: Int = 0
18	    private(set) var progressTotal: Int = 0
19	    private(set) var currentRecordID: String?
20	    /// History of completed runs, newest first. Lets the user compare different model / preference
21	    /// configurations in one session. Cleared when the browser window closes.
22	    private(set) var history: [BenchmarkReport] = []
23	    /// The currently-displayed report from history. Defaults to the newest entry; user can switch.
24	    var displayedRunAt: String?
25	    private(set) var errorMessage: String?
26	
27	    /// One-off feedback flag — view sets to nil after surfacing it.
28	    var lastExportPath: String?
29	
30	    // Dependencies
31	    private let datasetStore: DatasetStore
32	    private let audioFileStore: AudioFileStore
33	    private let modelsDirectory: URL
34	
35	    private var task: Task<Void, Never>?
36	
37	    init(
38	        datasetStore: DatasetStore,
39	        audioFileStore: AudioFileStore,
40	        modelsDirectory: URL,
41	        initialProfile: ModelProfile,
42	        initialPreference: ChinesePreference
43	    ) {
44	        self.datasetStore = datasetStore
45	        self.audioFileStore = audioFileStore
46	        self.modelsDirectory = modelsDirectory
47	        self.selectedProfile = initialProfile
48	        self.selectedPreference = initialPreference
49	    }
50	
51	    var progressFraction: Double {
52	        guard progressTotal > 0 else { return 0 }
53	        return Double(progressCompleted) / Double(progressTotal)
54	    }
55	
56	    func run() {
57	        guard !isRunning else { return }
58	        let profile = selectedProfile
59	        let preference = selectedPreference
60	        let datasetStore = datasetStore
61	        let audioFileStore = audioFileStore
62	        let modelsDirectory = modelsDirectory
63	
64	        isRunning = true
65	        errorMessage = nil
66	        progressCompleted = 0
67	        progressTotal = 0
68	        currentRecordID = nil
69	
70	        task = Task { @MainActor [weak self] in
71	            defer {
72	                self?.isRunning = false
73	                self?.currentRecordID = nil
74	                self?.task = nil
75	            }
76	            do {
77	                let records = try await datasetStore.all()
78	                guard !records.isEmpty else {
79	                    self?.errorMessage = String(localized: "Dataset is empty — nothing to benchmark.")
80	                    return
81	                }
82	                self?.progressTotal = records.count
83	
84	                // Transient runtime so the popup's active runtime is undisturbed. It will be
85	                // unloaded after the run completes.
86	                let runtime = ASRRuntimeFactory.make(profile: profile, cacheDirectory: modelsDirectory)
87	                do {
88	                    try await runtime.preload()
89	                } catch {
90	                    self?.errorMessage = String(localized: "Model preload failed: \(error.localizedDescription)")
91	                    return
92	                }
93	
94	                let runner = BenchmarkRunner()
95	                let report: BenchmarkReport
96	                do {
97	                    report = try await runner.run(
98	                        records: records,
99	                        runtime: runtime,
100	                        chinesePreference: preference,
101	                        audioURLProvider: { record in
102	                            await audioFileStore.absoluteURL(for: record.audioPath)
103	                        },
104	                        progress: { [weak self] p in
105	                            await MainActor.run {
106	                                self?.progressCompleted = p.completed
107	                                self?.currentRecordID = p.currentRecordID.isEmpty ? nil : p.currentRecordID
108	                            }
109	                        }
110	                    )
111	                } catch is CancellationError {
112	                    await runtime.unload()
113	                    self?.errorMessage = String(localized: "Cancelled.")
114	                    return
115	                } catch {
116	                    await runtime.unload()
117	                    self?.errorMessage = String(localized: "Benchmark failed: \(error.localizedDescription)")
118	                    return
119	                }
120	                await runtime.unload()
121	                if let self {
122	                    self.history.insert(report, at: 0)
123	                    self.displayedRunAt = report.runAt
124	                }
125	            } catch {
126	                self?.errorMessage = String(localized: "Failed to load records: \(error.localizedDescription)")
127	            }
128	        }
129	    }
130	
131	    func cancel() {
132	        task?.cancel()
133	    }
134	
135	    /// The displayed report — either an explicit selection from history or the newest run.
136	    var displayedReport: BenchmarkReport? {
137	        if let runAt = displayedRunAt, let hit = history.first(where: { $0.runAt == runAt }) {
138	            return hit
139	        }
140	        return history.first
141	    }
142	
143	    /// Encodes the displayed report to pretty-printed JSON and writes it to `url`.
144	    func exportJSON(to url: URL) throws {
145	        guard let report = displayedReport else {
146	            throw NSError(domain: "Benchmark", code: 1, userInfo: [NSLocalizedDescriptionKey: "No report to export"])
147	        }
148	        let encoder = JSONEncoder()
149	        encoder.outputFormatting = [.prettyPrinted, .sortedKeys, .withoutEscapingSlashes]
150	        let data = try encoder.encode(report)
151	        try data.write(to: url, options: .atomic)
152	        lastExportPath = url.path
153	    }
154	}

4	final class TextMetricsTests: XCTestCase {
5	    func testEditDistanceBasics() {
6	        XCTAssertEqual(TextMetrics.editDistance("", ""), 0)
7	        XCTAssertEqual(TextMetrics.editDistance("abc", ""), 3)
8	        XCTAssertEqual(TextMetrics.editDistance("", "abc"), 3)
9	        XCTAssertEqual(TextMetrics.editDistance("kitten", "sitting"), 3)
10	        XCTAssertEqual(TextMetrics.editDistance("abc", "abc"), 0)
11	    }
12	
13	    func testEditDistanceChineseCharacters() {
14	        XCTAssertEqual(TextMetrics.editDistance("會議重點", "會議結論"), 2)
15	        XCTAssertEqual(TextMetrics.editDistance("這是測試", "這是測試"), 0)
16	        XCTAssertEqual(TextMetrics.editDistance("這是測試", "這是錯誤的測試"), 3)
17	    }
18	
19	    func testCERIsLengthNormalized() {
20	        // Perfect match → 0
21	        XCTAssertEqual(TextMetrics.cer(reference: "abc", hypothesis: "abc"), 0)
22	        // 1 substitution out of 3 chars → 1/3
23	        XCTAssertEqual(TextMetrics.cer(reference: "abc", hypothesis: "abd"), 1.0 / 3.0, accuracy: 1e-9)
24	        // Empty ref + empty hyp → 0; empty ref + non-empty hyp → 1
25	        XCTAssertEqual(TextMetrics.cer(reference: "", hypothesis: ""), 0)
26	        XCTAssertEqual(TextMetrics.cer(reference: "", hypothesis: "x"), 1)
27	    }
28

aiTitle: 修改 CER 為 WER 並調整延遲顯示

content.text:
`** TEST SUCCEEDED **` — 全部 13 個測試通過（含 4 個新增 WER 測試），且 `TextMetrics`/`BenchmarkRunner`/`BenchmarkController`/`BenchmarkView` 皆編譯無誤、無警告。

## 完成

依你的需求改好 Benchmark 結果摘要區，版面從原本兩行變三行：

```
平均 CER 0.074        平均 WER 0.0xx
平均延遲 784 ms        平均 RTF 0.4x×
```

### 改動內容

**1. 新增 WER 指標** — `ThinkAloud/Core/Dataset/TextMetrics.swift`
- 把 `editDistance` 泛型化，可同時吃 `[Character]`（CER）與 `[String]`（WER）。
- 新增 `wer(reference:hypothesis:mode:)` 與 `wordTokens(_:)`：採 jiwer 式混合語言斷詞——**每個中日韓表意字各算一個「詞」**，連續的拉丁字母/數字串成一個詞（例：`build a GitHub 網站` → `["build","a","GitHub","網","站"]`）。沿用既有的 light / aggressive 雙模式，與 CER 一致。

**2. 計算並儲存 WER + 音訊長度** — `ThinkAloud/Core/Dataset/BenchmarkRunner.swift`
- `BenchmarkResult` 新增 `wer` / `werNormalized` / `audioDurationMs`（皆 optional，沿用既有 forward-compat 慣例）。
- 從 `loadAudioArray` 取回的 `sampleRate` + 樣本數算出音訊長度 → 每筆 `rtf = durationMs / audioDurationMs`。
- `BenchmarkReport` 新增 `averageWER(useNormalized:)` 與 `averageRTF`（無音訊長度資料時回 `nil`，UI 顯示「—」）。

**3. UI 版面** — `ThinkAloud/UI/DatasetBrowser/BenchmarkView.swift:207`
- 第三列：`平均 CER | 平均 WER`
- 第四列（新）：`平均延遲 | 平均 RTF`，RTF 格式為 `%.2f×`，並各帶 tooltip。

**4. 本地化** — `Localizable.xcstrings`：補上 `Avg WER`/`Avg RTF` 與兩個 tooltip 的正體中文翻譯。

**5. 測試** — `TextMetricsTests.swift`：新增 4 個 WER 測試（斷詞、詞級替換/插入、純中文逐字、aggressive 去標點）。

### 驗證
`xcodebuild test … -only-testing:TextMetricsTests` → **TEST SUCCEEDED**，13/13 通過，全專案編譯無誤。

幾點補充：
- 每筆記錄列（`CER 0.01 4,663 ms`）維持原樣，因你的指示是針對「結果」摘要區；若也想在每列加 WER/RTF 跟我說。
- RTF 採各筆平均（與「平均」標籤、現有 averageCER/averageLatency 的平均慣例一致），非總處理時間 ÷ 總音訊。若你偏好整體吞吐版本（sum/sum）也可改。
- 過程中遇到一個環境問題：DerivedData 裡有個 stale 的已簽章 `ThinkAloud.app` 被 macOS App Management 鎖住，導致 CLI 重建失敗；我刪掉它後重建即正常。Xcode 內建置不受影響。

順手記下這次反覆遇到的 CLI 建置環境陷阱，供未來 session 參考：

input.content:
---
name: cli-build-app-management-lock
description: CLI xcodebuild fails with "unable to create directory .app/Contents/PlugIns (Operation not permitted)" — fix by deleting the stale signed .app first
metadata:
  type: project
---

When building ThinkAloud via `xcodebuild` from this harness, the build can fail with `error: unable to create directory '.../Build/Products/Debug/ThinkAloud.app/Contents/PlugIns' (Operation not permitted)` and `** BUILD/TEST FAILED **` — even though no Swift compile errors exist.

**Why:** macOS App Management (TCC) protects the *existing code-signed* `ThinkAloud.app` bundle from modification by this process; `xcodebuild` can't update its `Contents/PlugIns`. The EPERM is at the bundling stage, not compilation — so the error is misleading.

**How to apply:** Before building, `rm -rf` the stale bundle, then run xcodebuild with the sandbox disabled (`dangerouslyDisableSandbox: true`, since DerivedData lives outside the cwd):
```
rm -rf ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/ThinkAloud-*/Build/Products/Debug/ThinkAloud.app
xcodebuild test -scheme ThinkAloud -destination 'platform=macOS' -only-testing:ThinkAloudTests/<Suite>
```
Each successful build re-signs a fresh `.app`, which is protected again — so delete it before *every* CLI rebuild. Xcode.app's own builds are unaffected. Scheme is `ThinkAloud`; tests live in target `ThinkAloudTests`.

## 完成：手動選擇 app 介面語言

在「一般」設定頁最上方新增「**語言**」區塊，含一個下拉選單：

| 選項 | 行為 |
|------|------|
| **自動（跟隨系統）** | 移除覆寫，跟隨系統語言 |
| **English** | 鎖定英文 |
| **正體中文** | 鎖定正體中文 |

### 改動內容

**`ThinkAloud/UI/Settings/GeneralPane.swift`**
- 新增 `AppLanguage` enum（`.system` / `.english` / `.traditionalChinese`）。因專案**沒有用檔案系統同步群組**，新增獨立 `.swift` 需手改 `project.pbxproj`（高風險、低效益），所以把 enum 放進它唯一的使用處 `GeneralPane.swift`，零 pbxproj 風險。
- 新增「語言」Section（置於頂部）：`Picker` 綁定 `@AppStorage("appLanguageSelection")`。選項以各自語言原文顯示（autonym），只有「自動」是本地化字串。
- 機制：選擇當下即寫入 per-app `AppleLanguages` user default（`["zh-Hant"]` / `["en"]`，或移除＝自動）。bundle 在**啟動時**讀取 → 變更需重啟生效。改變後會出現「立即重新啟動」按鈕（`NSWorkspace.openApplication` 開新實例後終止舊的）。因設定即時寫入，正常離開再開也會套用。

**`ThinkAloud/Resources/Localizable.xcstrings`**
- 新增 5 個 zh-Hant 譯文：`App language→介面語言`、`Automatic (system)→自動（跟隨系統）`、footer 說明、`Relaunch now→立即重新啟動`、`Restart to apply the new language.→重新啟動以套用新語言。`；沿用既有 `Language→語言`。

### 驗證
- `xcodebuild build -scheme ThinkAloud` → **BUILD SUCCEEDED**，`GeneralPane.swift` 無 error/warning。
- 確認 4 個新譯文已正確編進 `ThinkAloud.app/Contents/Resources/zh-Hant.lproj/Localizable.strings`，且 `zh-Hant.lproj` + `en.lproj` 都在 bundle 內——切換語言的所有前提齊備。

### 須知
- **可選語言僅限 app 實際有的本地化**（英文 + 正體中文），因為這兩個才有對應 lproj；新增其他語言要先補翻譯。
- 語言切換**重啟後生效**——SwiftUI/AppKit 全介面（含選單列）無法可靠地即時熱抽換字串，重啟是 macOS 慣例做法。
- 我未實際點開執行中的 menubar app 視覺確認（需手動互動），但編譯、譯文落地、lproj 存在皆已驗證；要的話我可以幫你跑起來截圖確認。

（另外把這次反覆遇到的 CLI 建置陷阱——既有已簽章 `.app` 被 macOS App Management 鎖住導致 `xcodebuild` 報 "Operation not permitted"，需先 `rm` 再以停用 sandbox 重建——存進記憶供日後參考。）

1:# Tag-driven signed + notarized DMG release.
3:# Triggers on tags matching `v*` (e.g. `v0.2.0`). Also runnable manually for dry runs.
17:#   SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY          base64 ed25519 private key for signing Sparkle updates.
18:#                                   Generate once: download Sparkle's tools, run `./bin/generate_keys`
22:#                                   the release still ships but no appcast is generated (no auto-update).
28:    tags:
32:      tag:
33:        description: 'Tag to build (e.g. v0.2.0). For manual dry runs.'
51:          fetch-depth: 0   # so `gh release --generate-notes` can diff against the previous tag
53:      - name: Resolve version
54:        id: version
58:            TAG="${{ inputs.tag }}"
60:            TAG="${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}"
62:          VERSION="${TAG#v}"
63:          echo "tag=$TAG"                              >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
64:          echo "version=$VERSION"                     >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
66:          echo "Building $TAG (MARKETING_VERSION=$VERSION, CFBundleVersion=$GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER)"
71:          # mlx-audio-swift's Package.swift uses `swift-tools-version:6.2`, which requires
76:          xcodebuild -version
77:          swift --version
118:          MARKETING_VERSION:       ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
119:          CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION: ${{ steps.version.outputs.build }}
128:            MARKETING_VERSION="$MARKETING_VERSION" \
129:            CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION="$CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION" \
159:          VERSION="${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
161:          DMG_NAME="ThinkAloud-$VERSION.dmg"
163:          STAGING="$RUNNER_TEMP/dmg-staging"
165:          mkdir -p "$STAGING"
166:          cp -R "$APP" "$STAGING/"
167:          ln -s /Applications "$STAGING/Applications"   # drag-to-install affordance
171:            -srcfolder "$STAGING" \
227:      - name: Generate Sparkle appcast
228:        id: appcast
230:          # base64 ed25519 private key exported via `generate_keys -x`. If unset, the appcast is
232:          SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY: ${{ secrets.SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY }}
235:          if [[ -z "${SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY:-}" ]]; then
